notes: IDE Mode reliability release. Fixes sessions getting stuck on "Working": the working state is now driven by turns — it starts when you submit a prompt and ends on a hook (done / needs-input) or session exit — so a freshly opened, untouched tab stays idle instead of showing Working forever. Also repairs the loopback hook listener that was dropping POST bodies (the Expect: 100-continue handshake from PowerShell's Invoke-RestMethod), which was the underlying reason Stop/Notification hooks often never arrived to clear the state. Newly added sessions now get keyboard focus so you can type right away.
